toc_title: What is IoT Hub Device Provisioning Service?
title: Overview of Azure IoT Hub Device Provisioning Service - Azure IoT Hub Device Provisioning Service
description: Describes production scale device provisioning in Azure with the Device Provisioning Service (DPS) and IoT Hub
summary: The IoT Hub Device Provisioning Service (DPS) is a helper service for IoT Hub that enables zero-touch, just-in-time provisioning to the right IoT hub without requiring human intervention. In a cloud-based solution, DPS enables the provisioning of millions of devices in a secure and scalable manner. Many of the manual steps traditionally involved in provisioning are automated with DPS to reduce the time to deploy IoT devices and lower the risk of manual error.
classification_reason: High-level overview of Azure IoT Hub Device Provisioning Service describing purpose and benefits without specific limits, configuration parameters, error codes, or decision matrices.
